reasoning: President Yamandú Orsi is confirmed to have attended the July 2025 BRICS Summit in Brazil, as shown by numerous news reports of his meetings with global leaders like PM Modi during the event. An article published by Ámbito on June 27, 2025 reports that 'Presidency sources confirmed to Ámbito that Orsi, along with Foreign Minister Mario Lubetkin, will arrive in the Brazilian city on Friday, July 4...' This serves as a public communication on behalf of the government confirming his in-person attendance prior to the deadline. Because he actually attended and his travel plans were publicly detailed and confirmed by the Presidency in late June, the criteria for a YES resolution are fully met.
